assertions.reason: Token selector search filters correctly: query "CASH" leaves only CASH entries and query "xyz" shows no results state.
Tab navigation moves focus across interactive controls and the focused element shows a visible outline (observed computed style: 1px auto rgb(0, 95, 204)).
Escape closes the token selector modal, but focus does not return to the trigger element; focus lands on BODY instead.

Wallet extension integration is unavailable in this environment (wallet modal shows install links for Petra/Nightly/Backpack, with no connected wallet extension available). Fallback disconnected state is observable and stable.
evidence: Fallback observed: navbar CTA remains "Connect Wallet", swap CTA remains "Connect Wallet", balances not shown

assertions.reason: On Swap tab, amount was entered, switching to Limit showed limit form fields, and switching back to Swap preserved the entered amount (value remained 12).
evidence: Observed swap input value after return: 12

assertions.reason: Could not validate disconnect-after-connect behavior because no wallet extension could be connected in this environment. Observable fallback disconnected state is correct.
evidence: Fallback observed: disconnected navbar/swap CTAs both show "Connect Wallet"

blockers.description: No connectable Aptos wallet extension was available in the browser session (only install options were presented).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Opened wallet modal from navbar and checked available Aptos wallet options; only install links were available.

summary: Validated 6 assertions: 3 passed (VAL-ERROR-005, VAL-A11Y-001, VAL-CROSS-UI-003), 1 failed (VAL-A11Y-002 focus return on Escape), and 2 were blocked due to unavailable wallet extension integration (VAL-CROSS-UI-002, VAL-POLISH-008).
